chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI IInd Appeal No.01 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For order on office objection as at A. 2. For hearing of CMA No.12 of 2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2026 Mr. Salman Ahmed Sheikh, Advocate for the appellant. Mr. Ahmed Khan Khaskheli, AAG Sindh. ------------------------------------ Counsel for the appellant no longer wishes to press this appeal. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
